/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../../../../../../VST3/Release/remap-paramid.vst3/Contents/MacOS/remap-paramid "CMakeFiles/remap-paramid.dir/source/remapparamidprocessor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/remap-paramid.dir/source/remapparamidcontroller.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/remap-paramid.dir/source/remapparamidentry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/remap-paramid.dir/__/__/__/source/main/macmain.cpp.o"  -framework CoreFoundation ../../../../../../lib/Release/libsdk.a ../../../../../../lib/Release/libsdk_common.a ../../../../../../lib/Release/libbase.a ../../../../../../lib/Release/libpluginterfaces.a
